name: StageMilestones
description: Template milestones for each StageDefinition. Not client-scoped (templates, no PII). ClientMilestoneProgress rows reference these per client. seedData stageDefinitionId placeholders match the 1-based ORDER of rows in StageDefinitions.seedData (1=Traction/Intake ... 19=Soft Landing/Long-Term Integration); sync remaps to real ids. All titles/descriptions are DRAFT.

columns.name: createdAt
columns.description: Item created at. ISO 8601 datetime string, format: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS, e.g. 2025-09-30T18:45:00Z, 2025-09-30T18:45:00+05:30

columns.name: updatedAt
columns.description: Item updated at. ISO 8601 datetime string, format: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS, e.g. 2025-09-30T18:45:00Z, 2025-09-30T18:45:00+05:30
